description_long: This is a square decorative cushion featuring a vibrant botanical print with large green monstera leaves, slender palm fronds, and small orange flowers scattered across a white background. The fabric appears to be smooth and tightly woven, likely made of cotton or a polyester blend, giving it a soft and inviting texture. The cushion is plump and well-stuffed, suggesting a filling of synthetic fiber or polyester, which provides both comfort and resilience. The edges are neatly finished, and the print is consistent across all visible sides, indicating quality craftsmanship. The overall design is cheerful and modern, suitable for brightening up outdoor or indoor seating areas. There are no visible brand markings or tags, and the cushion appears to be in pristine, new condition.
description: A square cushion with a white background, decorated with green leaves and orange flowers in a lively botanical print. The cushion is plump, soft, and appears new.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full botanical print with large green leaves, palm fronds, and orange flowers on a white background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cushion's thickness and the continuation of the leaf and flower pattern along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the same botanical print and vibrant colors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cushion's thickness and the seamless wrap of the pattern around the edge.
attribute_placement: placed on a lounge chair or outdoor sofa as a decorative and comfort accent
attribute_pattern: botanical print with green leaves and orange flowers
